postReview.title: Newcastle United 2-3 Brentford: Ouattara shines on landmark Premier League appearance
postReview.description: Dango Ouattara scored Brentford's winner as Keith Andrews' team came out on top in a topsy-turvy Premier League clash at Newcastle United.

postReview.title: Newcastle United 2-3 Brentford: Ouattara brilla en su partido 100 en la Premier League
postReview.description: Ouattara marcó el gol del triunfo del Brentford, que se impuso al Newcastle United en un partido de la Premier League lleno de alternativas.

postReview.title: Newcastle United 2-3 Brentford: Ouattara brilha em partida histórica na Premier League
postReview.description: Dango Ouattara marcou o gol da vitória do Brentford, e o time de Keith Andrews levou a melhor em um duelo de reviravoltas na Premier League, em Newcastle.

postReview.title: Newcastle United 2-3 Brentford: Ouattara brilla alla 100ª presenza in Premier League
postReview.description: Dango Ouattara ha firmato il gol decisivo del Brentford: la squadra di Keith Andrews l’ha spuntata in un’altalena di emozioni in Premier League sul campo del Newcastle United.

postReview.title: Newcastle United 2-3 Brentford : Ouattara brille pour sa 100e en Premier League
postReview.description: Dango Ouattara a offert la victoire à Brentford : l'équipe de Keith Andrews est sortie gagnante d'un match à rebondissements en Premier League sur la pelouse de Newcastle United.

postReview.title: Newcastle United 2:3 Brentford: Ouattara glänzt bei Premier-League-Jubiläum
postReview.description: Dango Ouattara erzielte den Siegtreffer für Brentford, als sich das Team von Keith Andrews in einem turbulenten Premier-League-Duell bei Newcastle United durchsetzte.

postReview.title: نيوكاسل يونايتد 2-3 برينتفورد: أواتارا يتألق في مباراته رقم 100 بالدوري الإنجليزي
postReview.description: سجل دانغو أواتارا هدف فوز برينتفورد، ليحسم فريق كيث أندروز مواجهة متقلبة في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز على أرض نيوكاسل يونايتد.

postReview.title: Newcastle United 2-3 Brentford: Ouattara brilha na 100.ª presença na Premier League
postReview.description: Ouattara marcou o golo da vitória do Brentford num jogo de altos e baixos da Premier League, em Newcastle, e a equipa de Keith Andrews levou a melhor.

preReview.title: Howe solely focused on Newcastle, not England job
preReview.description: Eddie Howe has been tipped to leave, or be sacked by, Newcastle United, with the England job seen as a potential landing spot for him.

preReview.title: Howe solo piensa en el Newcastle, no en el cargo de seleccionador de Inglaterra
preReview.description: Eddie Howe vuelve a estar en el punto de mira por una posible salida del Newcastle United, ya sea por decisión propia o por un despido, con el cargo de seleccionador de Inglaterra como posible destino.

preReview.title: Howe está totalmente concentrado no Newcastle, não na seleção inglesa
preReview.description: Eddie Howe tem sido apontado como possível saída do Newcastle United, seja por decisão própria ou por demissão, com o cargo na seleção da Inglaterra visto como um destino em potencial.

preReview.title: Howe pensa solo al Newcastle, non alla panchina dell'Inghilterra
preReview.description: Eddie Howe è stato indicato come possibile partente o a rischio esonero dal Newcastle United, con la panchina dell'Inghilterra vista come possibile destinazione.

preReview.title: Howe voll auf Newcastle konzentriert – nicht auf den England-Job
preReview.description: Eddie Howe wird bei Newcastle United als Abgangs- oder Wackelkandidat gehandelt – der England-Job gilt als mögliche Option.

preReview.title: Howe se concentre uniquement sur Newcastle, pas sur le poste de sélectionneur de l'Angleterre
preReview.description: Eddie Howe est annoncé sur le départ, voire menacé de licenciement, à Newcastle United, le poste de sélectionneur de l'Angleterre étant évoqué comme un possible point de chute.

preReview.title: هاو يركز فقط على نيوكاسل وليس على تدريب إنجلترا
preReview.description: تكهنات حول رحيل إيدي هاو أو إقالته من نيوكاسل يونايتد، مع طرح تدريب إنجلترا كوجهة محتملة.

preReview.title: Howe só tem o Newcastle na cabeça, não o cargo de selecionador de Inglaterra
preReview.description: Eddie Howe tem sido apontado à saída do Newcastle United e pode mesmo ser despedido, com a seleção inglesa vista como um possível destino.

translations.estimated_transfer_value_description:
Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) is an estimate of what a player could be worth if they were sold today.

It’s calculated using historical transfer data and a range of performance and context factors, including:

• player performance and development
• age and future potential
• how often and at what level they play
• position
• team and league strength
• remaining contract length

ETV focuses on the player themselves, not rumours or which club might buy them.

The value is updated regularly to reflect changes over time.
translations.xG_onboarding_description:
Expected goals is a measurement of the quality of a shot.

A team’s xG number for a match is an indication of how many goals they could have been expected to score, given the chances they created.

translations.stats_comparison_explanation:
The Player Traits chart highlights a player's statistical strengths and weaknesses, in comparison to similar players.

Each stat is adjusted on a per 90 basis and includes matches from the past 365 days.

Players are then compared to positional peers from similar leagues, and placed into a percentile ranking. For example, a player with a 90% percentile ranking on Chances Created means that they create more chances than 90% of players in their position in similar leagues.

Full details on comparisons can be read in our FAQ.
translations.per_90_bar_explanation_text:
The bar graph shows how a player compares to other players in their position on each stat for the currently selected competition. A green bar graph indicates they are among the best in their position at that stat, while a red bar indicates they are among the worst.

The length of the bar graph represents the rank of the player for each stat, based on percentile. Players are compared only against their positional peers from the currently selected competition.

translations.xpts_explanation:
Expected Points (xPts) reflect the number of points a team was expected to earn from a match, based on the quality of their chances measured by Expected Goals (xG).

xPts for a match are calculated by simulating possible outcomes using the quality of shots, expressed as xG. The simulation awards points for wins, draws, or losses based on xG.

The xPts are accumulated over the season to form the 'xG-table', also known as the 'Justice table', which provides an alternative view of team performance beyond actual points earned.
translations.xpts_explanation_green_numbers: Green numbers indicate better underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.xpts_explanation_red_numbers: Red numbers indicate worse underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.site_description_league_table_xg: %1$s %2$s ranked by expected points (xPts). See %1$s xG table, or justice table for %2$s and other seasons on FotMob.
translations.xg_table_explanation:
The xG table ranks teams based on their expected goals (xG) stats.

• Green numbers mean a team is doing better than expected.
• Red numbers mean a team is doing worse than expected.
• The small number next to the xG value shows the difference between expected and actual performance.

For more details on how it’s calculated, check the FAQ.
translations.play_offs_explanation:
The play-off matchups are determined by a draw. In each grouping, the two teams on the left are drawn against the two teams on the right to create two play-off matchups. The play-offs are played over two legs, with the winner going to the round of 16.

There is a separate draw for the round of 16 using the same process.

translations.estimated_transfer_value_description:
Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) is an estimate of what a player could be worth if they were sold today.

It’s calculated using historical transfer data and a range of performance and context factors, including:

• player performance and development
• age and future potential
• how often and at what level they play
• position
• team and league strength
• remaining contract length

ETV focuses on the player themselves, not rumours or which club might buy them.

The value is updated regularly to reflect changes over time.
translations.xG_onboarding_description:
Expected goals is a measurement of the quality of a shot.

A team’s xG number for a match is an indication of how many goals they could have been expected to score, given the chances they created.

translations.defensive_actions_explained: Defensive contributions is the sum of attempted tackles, blocks, clearances, and interceptions.
translations.stats_comparison_explanation:
The Player Traits chart highlights a player's statistical strengths and weaknesses, in comparison to similar players.

Each stat is adjusted on a per 90 basis and includes matches from the past 365 days.

Players are then compared to positional peers from similar leagues, and placed into a percentile ranking. For example, a player with a 90% percentile ranking on Chances Created means that they create more chances than 90% of players in their position in similar leagues.

Full details on comparisons can be read in our FAQ.
translations.per_90_bar_explanation_text:
The bar graph shows how a player compares to other players in their position on each stat for the currently selected competition. A green bar graph indicates they are among the best in their position at that stat, while a red bar indicates they are among the worst.

The length of the bar graph represents the rank of the player for each stat, based on percentile. Players are compared only against their positional peers from the currently selected competition.

translations.xpts_explanation:
Expected Points (xPts) reflect the number of points a team was expected to earn from a match, based on the quality of their chances measured by Expected Goals (xG).

xPts for a match are calculated by simulating possible outcomes using the quality of shots, expressed as xG. The simulation awards points for wins, draws, or losses based on xG.

The xPts are accumulated over the season to form the 'xG-table', also known as the 'Justice table', which provides an alternative view of team performance beyond actual points earned.
translations.xpts_explanation_green_numbers: Green numbers indicate better underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.xpts_explanation_red_numbers: Red numbers indicate worse underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.site_description_league_table_xg: %1$s %2$s ranked by expected points (xPts). See %1$s xG table, or justice table for %2$s and other seasons on FotMob.
translations.xg_table_explanation:
The xG table ranks teams based on their expected goals (xG) stats.

• Green numbers mean a team is doing better than expected.
• Red numbers mean a team is doing worse than expected.
• The small number next to the xG value shows the difference between expected and actual performance.

For more details on how it’s calculated, check the FAQ.
translations.play_offs_explanation:
The play-off matchups are determined by a draw. In each grouping, the two teams on the left are drawn against the two teams on the right to create two play-off matchups. The play-offs are played over two legs, with the winner going to the round of 16.

There is a separate draw for the round of 16 using the same process.
